nodes.title: Audio
nodes.summary: Audio — 62 products grouped under the audio category.

content.text:
# Audio

Subtree fanout for the audio category. Walking this subtree returns the category node plus its 62 product children — agents looking for audio can fetch this scope without scanning the flat catalog index.
